name: update-popup
title: Update Popup
description: A popup component for displaying updates.

files.content:
{#if shouldShow && displayedVersion}

{isManualView ? displayedVersion.version : "Jetzt verfügbar"}

{displayedVersion.title}

{#each displayedVersion.changes as change, i (change.title + "-" + i)} {@const IconComponent = getIconComponent(change.icon)}
{#if IconComponent}
{/if}

{change.title}

{change.description}

{/each}
{#if !isManualView && displayedVersion.learnMoreUrl} Mehr erfahren {:else} {/if}
{/if}
